text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the incident at summer camp, Admire
Vega has been having frequent nightmares.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her dreams, her sister chides her for enjoying
races and forgetting to atone for the past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, she swears to never race for herself again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega heads for the Kikuka Sho bearing
the sad and difficult decision she's made.
